projects.title: LLM Resume Chatbot — Self-hosted on Raspberry Pi
projects.stack: Python · LLM API · Nginx · SSE · HTML · CSS · JavaScript · Raspberry Pi 4
projects.description: Self-hosted personal resume site served from a Raspberry Pi 4 via Nginx with dark/light theme and bilingual (EN/DE) support. Integrated an LLM via API that streams answers to recruiter questions in real time via a custom SSE chat widget. Demonstrates server-side Python and full-stack deployment on constrained hardware.

projects.title: SysML v2 Architecture — Adaptive Cruise Control System
projects.description: Master thesis: modelled the full logical and physical architecture of an ACC system in SysML v2 using OOSEM methodology. Covered detailed component interfaces, pin-level signal routing, and installation-space geometric models for weight distribution analysis. Derived quantitative cost and weight metrics directly from the architecture to support early-stage design decisions.

projects.title: Energy Management System — Mild Parallel HEV
projects.description: Developed a simulation-based energy management system for a mild parallel hybrid electric vehicle as part of the Seminar Electromobility at TU Kaiserslautern. Implemented controller and state logic in MATLAB/Simulink, integrated into a full vehicle plant model, and evaluated fuel consumption across NEDC and FTP-75 drive cycles.

education.description: Specialised in automotive software engineering, autonomous systems, and electric/hybrid powertrains. Thesis on model-based system architecture using SysML v2. Coursework included ADAS, control theory, embedded systems, and electromobility.

education.school: Dr. Babasaheb Ambedkar Marathwada University, India
education.description: Core foundation in mechatronics, robotics, automotive engineering, and control systems.
